title: Coverage eval — determine advisor needs from goals + recent concerns
perceive: Re-determine what advisors this spoke has versus what its current goals and recent concerns require. Follow Ozi's Team Coverage Evaluation in WAI-Spoke/advisors/ozi/context_prompt.md. Roster: WAI-Spoke/advisors/registry.json. Hub scope patterns: {hub_path}/WAI-Hub/advisors/octo/advisor-recommendation-patterns.json.
execute: 1. Read WAI-Spoke/advisors/registry.json (roster + last_run_at) and WAI-Spoke/advisors/departments.json (active departments).
2. Read WAI-Spoke/WAI-State.json for project goals/identity and scan the last 30 open lugs' titles for recent concerns/keywords.
3. Read {hub_path}/WAI-Hub/advisors/octo/advisor-recommendation-patterns.json; match active scopes against each scope_trigger's detection_signals.

4. For each matched scope whose advisor_ids_to_check are absent from the roster, record a gap with domain + suggested template + priority + a one-line justification tied to the goal/concern that surfaced it.

5. Update WAI-Spoke/advisors/ozi/scan_state.json team_coverage: set last_coverage_eval_at=now (ISO8601), active_scopes, and gaps_detected[] (each gap proposal_status='pending', with a justification field).
6. Do NOT provision advisors here. Recommendations become user-review lugs on the next scouting pass.
verify: team_coverage.last_coverage_eval_at updated to today; gaps_detected[] reflects the current roster-vs-goals analysis with a justification per gap; no advisor directories were created.
